current_evidence.runtime_reason: telegram media edges are slow from the current egress path

operator_steps: take a fresh read-only snapshot and confirm warp-svc is active plus 127.0.0.1:40000 accepts SOCKS
insert target_rule before the final direct tcp/udp catch-all rule
run xray -test against the staged config
restart only x-ui in a maintenance window
test Telegram media through client profiles and compare direct vs WARP egress
rollback from backup if Telegram media or normal browsing regresses

problem.selected_bypass: route Telegram media/data-center IPv4 ranges through existing Xray WARP outbound

rollout.rollback: restore config backup, run xray config test, restart x-ui once

target_rule_source.basis: Telegram AS / data-center IPv4 ranges used by current local probes and public AS/CIDR references
